results.caption: A person in a dark jacket selects fresh green limes from a basket at a vibrant market stall. suitable for background image
The image shows a vibrant outdoor market with fresh vegetables and people, featuring watermarks and text.

A group of people are at an exhibition booth displaying various agricultural products like lychees and packaged goods. The image contains text: PHUONG PHUONG SON, PHUONG CHU, and other Vietnamese text on banners and product labels.
The image contains watermarks (Alamy logo) and text: "alamy Image ID: 3E5BFY8 www.alamy.com".
